odoo.template: | Login Create Your Account Get started with your business in seconds Select Country * 🇿🇼 +263 🇿🇦 +27 🇿🇲 +260 🇧🇼 +267 🇲🇼 +265 🇲🇿 +258 🇰🇪 +254 🇹🇿 +255 🇺🇬 +256 🇪🇹 +251 🇳🇬 +234 🇬🇭 +233 🇩🇿 +213 🇪🇬 +20 🇲🇦 +212 🇹🇳 +216 🇸🇩 +249 🇨🇩 +243 🇨🇲 +237 🇨🇮 +225 🇸🇳 +221 🇬🇧 +44 🇺🇸 +1 🇮🇳 +91 🇨🇳 +86 🇦🇪 +971 🇸🇦 +966 🇦🇺 +61 🇩🇪 +49 🇫🇷 +33 At least 8 characters One uppercase letter (A–Z) One lowercase letter (a–z) One number (0–9) One special character (!@#$%^&*) Create Account Already have an account? Log In Our support team is ready to help. Reach out to us anytime. WhatsApp: Welcome Back Incorrect email or password. Please try again. Your account is not yet activated. Please check your email for a verification link. Login New to Havano? Sign up Forgot Password? Reset Password Enter your email to receive a reset link. New Password Enter your new password below. Invalid Link This password reset link is invalid or expired. Redirecting to login... This field is required Send Reset Link This field is required This field is required Reset Password Remembered it? Back to Login // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Country phone-code map (ISO2 -> dial code + flag) // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const COUNTRY_PHONE_MAP = { 'ZW': { code: '+263', flag: '🇿🇼' }, 'ZA': { code: '+27', flag: '🇿🇦' }, 'ZM': { code: '+260', flag: '🇿🇲' }, 'BW': { code: '+267', flag: '🇧🇼' }, 'MW': { code: '+265', flag: '🇲🇼' }, 'MZ': { code: '+258', flag: '🇲🇿' }, 'KE': { code: '+254', flag: '🇰🇪' }, 'TZ': { code: '+255', flag: '🇹🇿' }, 'UG': { code: '+256', flag: '🇺🇬' }, 'ET': { code: '+251', flag: '🇪🇹' }, 'NG': { code: '+234', flag: '🇳🇬' }, 'GH': { code: '+233', flag: '🇬🇭' }, 'DZ': { code: '+213', flag: '🇩🇿' }, 'EG': { code: '+20', flag: '🇪🇬' }, 'MA': { code: '+212', flag: '🇲🇦' }, 'TN': { code: '+216', flag: '🇹🇳' }, 'SD': { code: '+249', flag: '🇸🇩' }, 'CD': { code: '+243', flag: '🇨🇩' }, 'CM': { code: '+237', flag: '🇨🇲' }, 'CI': { code: '+225', flag: '🇨🇮' }, 'SN': { code: '+221', flag: '🇸🇳' }, 'GB': { code: '+44', flag: '🇬🇧' }, 'US': { code: '+1', flag: '🇺🇸' }, 'IN': { code: '+91', flag: '🇮🇳' }, 'CN': { code: '+86', flag: '🇨🇳' }, 'AE': { code: '+971', flag: '🇦🇪' }, 'SA': { code: '+966', flag: '🇸🇦' }, 'AU': { code: '+61', flag: '🇦🇺' }, 'DE': { code: '+49', flag: '🇩🇪' }, 'FR': { code: '+33', flag: '🇫🇷' }, 'JP': { code: '+81', flag: '🇯🇵' }, 'BR': { code: '+55', flag: '🇧🇷' }, 'MX': { code: '+52', flag: '🇲🇽' }, 'RU': { code: '+7', flag: '🇷🇺' }, 'ZZ': { code: '', flag: '🌍' } // fallback }; // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Utility helpers // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function showError(elOrId, msg) { const errEl = typeof elOrId === 'string' ? document.getElementById(elOrId) : elOrId; if (!errEl) return; errEl.textContent = msg; errEl.style.display = msg ? 'block' : 'none'; } function clearError(elOrId) { showError(elOrId, ''); } function setInputState(inputEl, hasError) { if (!inputEl) return; if (hasError) inputEl.classList.add('input-error'); else inputEl.classList.remove('input-error'); } // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Toggle password visibility // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function togglePassword(icon, inputId) { const input = document.getElementById(inputId); if (!input) return; if (input.type === 'password') { input.type = 'text'; icon.classList.replace('fa-eye', 'fa-eye-slash'); } else { input.type = 'password'; icon.classList.replace('fa-eye-slash', 'fa-eye'); } } // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Form toggle (login / signup / reset) // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function toggleForms(target) { ['signup-form','login-form','reset-form'].forEach(id => { document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('active'); }); const map = { login: 'login-form', signup: 'signup-form', reset: 'reset-form' }; const pathMap = { login: '/web/login', signup: '/web/signup', reset: '/web/reset_password' }; document.getElementById(map[target]).classList.add('active'); window.history.pushState({}, '', pathMap[target]); } // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Spinner on submit // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function showSpinner(form) { const btn = form.querySelector('.btn-submit'); if (!btn) return; const textSpan = btn.querySelector('.btn-text'); btn.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; btn.style.opacity = '0.9'; textSpan.innerHTML = '' + textSpan.innerText; } // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Auto-redirect after password reset success // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── (function() { const successMsg = document.getElementById('reset-success-msg'); if (successMsg) setTimeout(() => { window.location.href = '/web/login'; }, 2000); })(); // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Live password rule checker // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const PW_RULES = [ { id: 'rule-length', test: v => v.length >= 8 }, { id: 'rule-upper', test: v => /[A-Z]/.test(v) }, { id: 'rule-lower', test: v => /[a-z]/.test(v) }, { id: 'rule-number', test: v => /\d/.test(v) }, { id: 'rule-special', test: v => /[!@#$%^&*()\-_=+\[\]{};':"\\|,.<>\/?`~]/.test(v) }, ]; function checkPasswordRules(val) { return PW_RULES.every(r => { const el = document.getElementById(r.id); const passes = r.test(val); if (el) el.classList.toggle('ok', passes); return passes; }); } function isValidPassword(val) { return PW_RULES.every(r => r.test(val)); } // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // DOMContentLoaded — wire up all live validators // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () { // ── Select2 for country dropdown ────────────────── const $countrySelect = $('#country_id'); if ($countrySelect.length) { $countrySelect.select2({ placeholder: 'Select Country *', allowClear: false, width: '100%', dropdownParent: $('section.wrapper') }); // Sync phone code when country changes $countrySelect.on('change', function () { const selected = this.options[this.selectedIndex]; const flagAttr = selected ? selected.getAttribute('data-flag') : ''; const codeAttr = selected ? selected.getAttribute('data-code') : ''; if (flagAttr && COUNTRY_PHONE_MAP[flagAttr.toUpperCase()]) { const info = COUNTRY_PHONE_MAP[flagAttr.toUpperCase()]; syncPhoneCode(info.code, info.flag); } else if (codeAttr) { // fallback: match by dial code syncPhoneCode('+' + codeAttr, ''); } clearError('country-error'); $countrySelect[0].classList.remove('input-error'); }); } function syncPhoneCode(dialCode, flag) { const codeSelect = document.getElementById('phone_code_select'); if (!codeSelect || !dialCode) return; for (let opt of codeSelect.options) { if (opt.value === dialCode) { opt.selected = true; return; } } // code not in list — add it temporarily const newOpt = new Option((flag ? flag + ' ' : '') + dialCode, dialCode, true, true); codeSelect.prepend(newOpt); } // ── Full Name: letters only, live ───────────────── const nameInput = document.getElementById('full_name'); if (nameInput) { nameInput.addEventListener('input', function () { const val = this.value; if (val && !/^[A-Za-z\s]+$/.test(val)) { setInputState(this, true); showError('name-error', 'Full name can only contain letters and spaces.'); } else { setInputState(this, false); clearError('name-error'); } }); } // ── Password: live rule highlighting ────────────── const pwInput = document.getElementById('password'); const pwRulesBox = document.getElementById('pw-rules'); if (pwInput && pwRulesBox) { pwInput.addEventListener('focus', () => pwRulesBox.classList.add('visible')); pwInput.addEventListener('input', function () { checkPasswordRules(this.value); if (isValidPassword(this.value)) { setInputState(this, false); clearError('pw-error'); } // re-check confirm match const cpInput = document.getElementById('confirm_password'); if (cpInput && cpInput.value) { if (cpInput.value !== this.value) { setInputState(cpInput, true); showError('confirm-pw-error', 'Passwords do not match.'); } else { setInputState(cpInput, false); clearError('confirm-pw-error'); } } }); } // ── Confirm Password: live match check ──────────── const cpInput = document.getElementById('confirm_password'); if (cpInput) { cpInput.addEventListener('input', function () { const pw = document.getElementById('password'); if (pw && this.value && this.value !== pw.value) { setInputState(this, true); showError('confirm-pw-error', 'Passwords do not match.'); } else { setInputState(this, false); clearError('confirm-pw-error'); } }); } // ── Email: format check on blur only ────────────── const emailInput = document.getElementById('email'); if (emailInput) { emailInput.addEventListener('blur', function () { validateEmailField(this); }); emailInput.addEventListener('input', function () { // clear error while typing if (this.value && /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$/.test(this.value)) { setInputState(this, false); clearError('email-error'); } }); } // ── Phone row focus styles ──────────────────────── const phoneRow = document.getElementById('phone-row'); const phoneNumberInput = document.getElementById('phone_number'); if (phoneRow && phoneNumberInput) { phoneNumberInput.addEventListener('input', function () { if (this.value.trim()) { phoneRow.classList.remove('input-error'); clearError('phone-error'); } }); } // ── Login: basic field checks on blur ───────────── const loginEmailInput = document.getElementById('login_email'); if (loginEmailInput) { loginEmailInput.addEventListener('blur', function () { if (!this.value.trim()) { setInputState(this, true); showError('login-email-error', 'Please enter your email address.'); } else { setInputState(this, false); clearError('login-email-error'); } }); } const loginPwInput = document.getElementById('login_password'); if (loginPwInput) { loginPwInput.addEventListener('blur', function () { if (!this.value.trim()) { setInputState(this, true); showError('login-pw-error', 'Please enter your password.'); } else { setInputState(this, false); clearError('login-pw-error'); } }); } }); // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Email field validation helper // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function validateEmailField(input) { const val = (input.value || '').trim(); if (!val) { setInputState(input, true); showError('email-error', 'Email address is required.'); return false; } if (val.length > 254) { setInputState(input, true); showError('email-error', 'Email address is too long.'); return false; } const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$/; if (!emailRegex.test(val)) { setInputState(input, true); showError('email-error', 'Please enter a valid email (e.g. name@domain.com).'); return false; } setInputState(input, false); clearError('email-error'); return true; } // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Signup form: final submit validation // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function validateSignupForm(event, form) { let isValid = true; // Email const emailInput = document.getElementById('email'); if (!validateEmailField(emailInput)) isValid = false; // Shop name const orgInput = document.getElementById('org_name'); if (!orgInput || !orgInput.value.trim()) { setInputState(orgInput, true); showError('org-error', 'Shop / Business name is required.'); isValid = false; } else { setInputState(orgInput, false); clearError('org-error'); } // Full name const nameInput = document.getElementById('full_name'); if (!nameInput || !nameInput.value.trim()) { setInputState(nameInput, true); showError('name-error', 'Full name is required.'); isValid = false; } else if (!/^[A-Za-z\s]+$/.test(nameInput.value.trim())) { setInputState(nameInput, true); showError('name-error', 'Full name can only contain letters and spaces.'); isValid = false; } else { setInputState(nameInput, false); clearError('name-error'); } // Country const countryEl = document.getElementById('country_id'); if (!countryEl || !countryEl.value) { const s2El = document.querySelector('.select2-selection'); if (s2El) s2El.classList.add('input-error'); showError('country-error', 'Please select your country.'); isValid = false; } else { const s2El = document.querySelector('.select2-selection'); if (s2El) s2El.classList.remove('input-error'); clearError('country-error'); } // Phone const phoneInput = document.getElementById('phone_number'); const phoneRow = document.getElementById('phone-row'); if (!phoneInput || !phoneInput.value.trim()) { if (phoneRow) phoneRow.classList.add('input-error'); showError('phone-error', 'Phone number is required.'); isValid = false; } else { if (phoneRow) phoneRow.classList.remove('input-error'); clearError('phone-error'); } // Password const pwInput = document.getElementById('password'); if (!pwInput || !pwInput.value) { setInputState(pwInput, true); showError('pw-error', 'Password is required.'); isValid = false; } else if (!isValidPassword(pwInput.value)) { setInputState(pwInput, true); showError('pw-error', 'Password does not meet all requirements above.'); isValid = false; } else { setInputState(pwInput, false); clearError('pw-error'); } // Confirm password const cpInput = document.getElementById('confirm_password'); if (!cpInput || !cpInput.value) { setInputState(cpInput, true); showError('confirm-pw-error', 'Please confirm your password.'); isValid = false; } else if (cpInput.value !== (pwInput ? pwInput.value : '')) { setInputState(cpInput, true); showError('confirm-pw-error', 'Passwords do not match.'); isValid = false; } else { setInputState(cpInput, false); clearError('confirm-pw-error'); } if (!isValid) { event.preventDefault(); // Scroll to first error const firstErr = form.querySelector('.input-error'); if (firstErr) firstErr.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' }); return false; } showSpinner(form); return true; } // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Login form validation // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function validateLoginForm(event, form) { let isValid = true; const loginEmailInput = document.getElementById('login_email'); const loginPwInput = document.getElementById('login_password'); if (!loginEmailInput || !loginEmailInput.value.trim()) { setInputState(loginEmailInput, true); showError('login-email-error', 'Please enter your email address.'); isValid = false; } else { setInputState(loginEmailInput, false); clearError('login-email-error'); } if (!loginPwInput || !loginPwInput.value.trim()) { setInputState(loginPwInput, true); showError('login-pw-error', 'Please enter your password.'); isValid = false; } else { setInputState(loginPwInput, false); clearError('login-pw-error'); } if (!isValid) { event.preventDefault(); return false; } showSpinner(form); return true; } // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── // Reset password form validation // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function validateResetForm(event, form) { const inputs = form.querySelectorAll('input[required]'); let isValid = true; inputs.forEach(input => { if (!input.value.trim()) { setInputState(input, true); const errEl = input.closest('div').nextElementSibling; if (errEl && errEl.classList.contains('error-text')) { errEl.textContent = 'This field is required'; errEl.style.display = 'block'; } isValid = false; } }); if (!isValid) { event.preventDefault(); return false; } showSpinner(form); return true; }
